message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Interactions between the Control Plane (master node) and the Worker Node

actor "Georgina" as User
participant "API-Server" as API
database "etcd" as DB
participant "Controller Manager" as CM
participant "Scheduler" as Scheduler
participant "Power Operator" as PowerOp
participant "Kubelet" as Kubelet
participant "Power Node Agent" as PNA
participant "Power Optimization Library" as POL
participant "K8s Objects" as K8s
participant "Kube-Proxy" as Proxy

legend right
  <font color="blue">Control Plane ~ Master Node</font>
  <font color="green">Worker Node</font>
  <font color="orange">Power Manager System Setup</font>
  <font color="yellow">Power Manager Configuration</font>
  <font color="brown">Power Manager Deployment</font>
endlegend

== Kubernetes Initialization ==
User -> API: 1 kubectl create -f pod.yaml
activate API
API -> DB: 2 save new state
activate DB
DB --> API: 3 check for changes
deactivate DB
API -> Scheduler: 4 watch for unassigned pods(s)
activate Scheduler
Scheduler -> API: 5 notify about pod w nodename=""
deactivate Scheduler
API -> Scheduler: 6 assign pod to node
activate Scheduler
Scheduler -> DB: 7 save new state
activate DB
DB --> Scheduler: 8 look for newly assigned pod(s)
deactivate DB
Scheduler -> Kubelet: 9 bind pod to node
activate Kubelet
Kubelet -> PNA: 10 start container
activate PNA
PNA --> API: 11 update pod status
deactivate PNA
API -> DB: 12 save new state
activate DB
deactivate DB
deactivate Kubelet
deactivate Scheduler
deactivate API

== Power Manager Initialization ==
User -> Proxy: 1 Ensure correct proxy configuration
User -> Kubelet: 2 Confirm CPU Manager policy
note right of Kubelet: cpuManagerPolicy = "static"
User -> Kubelet: 3 Reserve System CPUs
note right of Kubelet: reservedSystemCPUs = "0"
Kubelet -> K8s: 4 Create Namespace
note right of K8s: apply config/rbac/namespace.yaml
Kubelet -> K8s: 5 Create RBAC and Service Accounts
note right of K8s: apply config/rbac/rbac.yaml
Kubelet -> K8s: 6 Create CRDs
note right of K8s: make
Kubelet -> K8s: 7 Label nodes
note right of K8s: label node <NODE_NAME> feature.node.kubernetes.io/power-node="true"

== Power Manager Deployment ==
User -> PNA: 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
User -> POL: 2 Deploy the config
note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
User -> POL: 3 Set Shared Profile
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
User -> POL: 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
User -> POL: 5 Deploy Pod
note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml

== Power Manager additional functionality ==
== Uncore ==
User -> Kubelet: 1 Confirm Kernel version
note right of Kubelet: kernel 5.6+ required for uncore
User -> POL: 2 Set Freq in Die and Pkg
note right of POL: examples/example-uncore
User -> PNA: 3 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
User -> POL: 4 Deploy the config
note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
User -> POL: 5 Set Shared Profile
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
User -> POL: 6 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
User -> POL: 7 Deploy Pod
note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
User -> POL: 8 Set Time of Day functionality
note right of POL: examples/example-timeofday

== P-State ==
User -> PNA: 1 Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
User -> POL: 2 Deploy the config
note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
User -> POL: 3 Set Shared Profile and configure the P-State governor
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
User -> POL: 4 Deploy th Workload
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
User -> POL: 5 Deploy Pod
note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml

== C-State ==
User -> PNA: Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
User -> POL: Deploy the config
note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
User -> POL: Set Shared Profile
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
User -> POL: Deploy th Workload
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
User -> POL: Deploy Pod
note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
User -> POL: Set C-State functionality
note right of POL: examples/example-cstates

== Time of Day ==
User -> PNA: Deploy Controller Manager
note right of PNA: apply config/manager/manager.yaml
User -> POL: Deploy the config
note right of POL: examples/example-powerconfig.yaml
User -> POL: Set Shared Profile
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-profile.yaml
User -> POL: Deploy th Workload
note right of POL: examples/example-shared-workload.yaml
User -> POL: Deploy Pod
note right of POL: examples/example-pod.yaml
User -> POL: Set Time of Day functionality
note right of POL: examples/example-timeofday

@enduml
```
